crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, review agent health via cortextos bus read-all-heartbeats, and work on coordination tasks.

crons.name: check-approvals
crons.prompt: Check for pending approvals and human tasks. For anything stale, send the user a Telegram reminder with the task title and what is blocked. ACK any approval/human-task inbox messages.

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Run a concise morning review: check goals, agent heartbeats, pending tasks, and send the user a Romanian briefing.

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Run an evening review: summarize the day, blocked work, agent outputs, and propose overnight tasks.
